name: swasthai-guardian

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../ai-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd ai-service && uvicorn main:app --port 8000 --host 127.0.0.1"
scripts.train:ai: cd ai-service && python train_disease_model.py && python train_deep_model.py && python calibrate_rag.py

description: Offline-first AI healthcare infrastructure for rural India — disease surveillance, autonomous outbreak detection, and emergency coordination for 600M+ citizens.
author: Tejshvini Yerpurwad (https://github.com/dgboy-ai)
